tags.description: Use Church St entrance, public bathroom is on first floor. Hours can change, currently 8am-430, 7 days. One of the few that stay open in winter.

tags.note: Door code at Stone Leaf Teahouse, no purchase required.

tags.description: Get code for door lock from shops in this plaza
